sentences.target: Le shérif arrive bientôt dans le film.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃeʁif aʁiv bjɛ̃to dɑ̃ lə film/

translations.fr: Le shérif arrive bientôt dans le film.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃeʁif aʁiv bjɛ̃to dɑ̃ lə film/
translations.en: The sheriff shows up soon in the movie.
translations.es: El sheriff aparece pronto en la película.
translations.de: Der Sheriff taucht bald im Film auf.
translations.it: Lo sceriffo compare presto nel film.
translations.zh-Hans: 治安官很快就会在电影里出现。
translations.yue: 治安官好快就會喺套戲入面出現。
translations.pt: O xerife aparece em breve no filme.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát trưởng sẽ sớm xuất hiện trong phim.
translations.nl: De sheriff verschijnt binnenkort in de film.
translations.hu: A seriff hamarosan feltűnik a filmben.
translations.hi: शेरिफ जल्द ही फिल्म में दिखेगा.
translations.pl: Szeryf wkrótce pojawi się w filmie.
translations.el: Ο σερίφης θα εμφανιστεί σύντομα στην ταινία.
translations.nb: Sheriffen dukker snart opp i filmen.
translations.id: Sherif akan segera muncul di film.
translations.sv: Sheriffen dyker snart upp i filmen.
translations.ro: Șeriful apare în curând în film.
translations.cs: Šerif se brzy objeví ve filmu.
translations.da: Sheriffen dukker snart op i filmen.
translations.ja: 保安官はもうすぐ映画に登場する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating near future.
Preposition introducing a locative/complement PP.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the object of the preposition.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On dirait un shérif avec ton chapeau.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ diʁɛ œ̃ ʃeʁif avɛk tɔ̃ ʃapo/

translations.fr: On dirait un shérif avec ton chapeau.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ diʁɛ œ̃ ʃeʁif avɛk tɔ̃ ʃapo/
translations.en: You look like a sheriff with your hat.
translations.es: Con ese sombrero pareces un sheriff.
translations.de: Mit deinem Hut siehst du aus wie ein Sheriff.
translations.it: Con il tuo cappello sembri uno sceriffo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你戴着那顶帽子看起来像个治安官。
translations.yue: 你戴嗰頂帽好似個治安官。
translations.ru: С этой шляпой ты похож на шерифа.
translations.pt: Com esse chapéu você parece um xerife.
translations.he: עם הכובע הזה אתה נראה כמו שריף.
translations.vi: Với chiếc mũ đó, trông bạn như cảnh sát trưởng.
translations.nl: Met die hoed lijk je op een sheriff.
translations.uk: З цим капелюхом ти виглядаєш як шериф.
translations.hu: Ezzel a kalappal úgy nézel ki, mint egy seriff.
translations.hi: उस टोपी में तुम शेरिफ जैसे लगते हो.
translations.pl: W tym kapeluszu wyglądasz jak szeryf.
translations.el: Με αυτό το καπέλο μοιάζεις με σερίφη.
translations.nb: Med den hatten ser du ut som en sheriff.
translations.id: Dengan topi itu kamu terlihat seperti seorang sherif.
translations.sv: Med den hatten ser du ut som en sheriff.
translations.ro: Cu pălăria aceea arăți ca un șerif.
translations.cs: S tím kloboukem vypadáš jako šerif.
translations.da: Med den hat ligner du en sherif.
translations.ja: その帽子だと君は保安官みたいに見える。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun (‘one/we’), subject of the verb.
Lexical verb, conditional present 3rd person singular; in the expression ‘On dirait’ signaling an appearance or supposition.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the NP ‘un shérif’.
Common noun; predicative complement in the construction ‘On dirait X’.
Preposition introducing an adjunct expressing accompaniment/attribute.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘chapeau’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: J’ai joué le shérif dans le jeu.
sentences.reading: /ʒe ʒwe lə ʃeʁif dɑ̃ lə ʒø/

translations.fr: J’ai joué le shérif dans le jeu.
translations.ipa: /ʒe ʒwe lə ʃeʁif dɑ̃ lə ʒø/
translations.en: I played the sheriff in the game.
translations.es: En el juego, yo era el sheriff.
translations.de: Im Spiel habe ich den Sheriff gespielt.
translations.it: Nel gioco ho interpretato lo sceriffo.
translations.zh-Hans: 在游戏里我扮演了治安官。
translations.yue: 喺遊戲入面我扮演咗治安官。
translations.pt: No jogo eu era o xerife.
translations.vi: Trong trò chơi tôi đóng vai cảnh sát trưởng.
translations.nl: In het spel was ik de sheriff.
translations.hi: खेल में मैंने शेरिफ की भूमिका निभाई.
translations.id: Di permainan aku memainkan peran sebagai sherif.
translations.ro: În joc am jucat rolul șerifului.
translations.ja: ゲームで私は保安官を演じた。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before vowel; 1st person singular subject.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 1st person singular; forms the compound past with the participle.
Past participle of the main verb; part of a passé composé construction.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object of ‘joué’ (role performed).
Preposition introducing a locative/context PP.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘jeu’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Tu joues le shérif au bureau aujourd’hui.
sentences.reading: /ty ʒu lə ʃeʁif o byʁo oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Tu joues le shérif au bureau aujourd’hui.
translations.ipa: /ty ʒu lə ʃeʁif o byʁo oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: You’re the sheriff at the office today.
translations.es: Hoy eres el sheriff en la oficina.
translations.de: Heute bist du der Sheriff im Büro.
translations.it: Oggi sei lo sceriffo in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天在办公室你就是治安官。
translations.yue: 你今日喺辦公室就係個治安官。
translations.pt: Hoje você é o xerife no escritório.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ở văn phòng, bạn là cảnh sát trưởng.
translations.nl: Vandaag ben jij de sheriff op kantoor.
translations.hu: Ma az irodában te vagy a seriff.
translations.hi: आज दफ़्तर में तुम ही शेरिफ हो.
translations.pl: Dziś w biurze to ty jesteś szeryfem.
translations.el: Σήμερα στο γραφείο εσύ είσαι ο σερίφης.
translations.nb: I dag er du sheriffen på kontoret.
translations.id: Hari ini di kantor kamu adalah sherif.
translations.sv: Idag är du sheriffen på kontoret.
translations.ro: Astăzi la birou tu ești șeriful.
translations.da: I dag er du sheriffen på kontoret.
translations.ja: 今日はオフィスで君が保安官だ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object (role played) of ‘joues’.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition introducing the locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause.
